text:
NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_RCLL_SW 

LONG NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_RCLL_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y = Yes, product recalled 
N = No, product not recalled (or not applicable) 

COMMENT: If any claim that comprises the Stay has a Condition code (CLM-RLT-COND-CD) equal to '50' then the 
MEDPAR Product Replacement Recall Switch ='Y'. If no '50' condition code, then field ='N'. 

This field is new in 2011. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
